summary:
Intra-epithelial bullae are characteristic findings associated with pemphigus due to disruptions in cell-to-cell attachments caused by autoimmune reactions against desmogleins. This condition includes both pemphigus vulgaris and its variant forms like pemphigus vegetans.
```

```. Answer choice: A
